title: dryopteris augescens
intro: Dryopteris augescens, also known as the creeping fern or autumn fern, is a species of fern native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris augescens include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a promising natural remedy for managing various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules for its medicinal use.
